info.title: Kittitas
info.description: An In-Memory version of the Roslyn compiler that can be used to debug components in the Roslyn pipeline

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

options.name: wait
options.description: Waits for a debugger to attach before continuing

options.name: attach
options.description: Attempts to attach a debugger before continuing

arguments.name: ProjectFile
arguments.description: The project file to build, or empty to build from the current directory.
